docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-02-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF APR-19-1991 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $950.00 FILED BY SINCLAIR TARA AS TO DEFENDANT BOSCHETTI PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
POS ON DEF.PAUL BOSCHETTI INVALID.NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINCLAIR TARA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOSCHETTI PAUL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
